title: CAP’2ER®: un outil d'évaluation gratuit des performances environnementales de votre élevage
description: A free online multicriteria diagnostic tool designed for broiler poultry farms to assess and benchmark their environmental footprint, including greenhouse gas emissions. It offers a simplified level 1 self-assessment for rapid awareness and a more comprehensive level 2 plan-of-action with professional guidance to reduce environmental impacts.
